source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ FDA/■ 1차 ADD_510(k)_submission_Final_201023.zip/WORD/VOL_001_510(k) Submission/016_Electromagnetic Compatibility and Electrical Safety.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Section states conformity with electrical safety, mechanical and thermal safety, and EMC standards, with testing performed by Nemko as an IECEE CBTL.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports FDA 510(k) submission evidence for device safety, effectiveness, electrical safety, and electromagnetic compatibility.
keyPoints: H&Abyz claims conformity with listed electrical, mechanical and thermal safety, and electromagnetic compatibility standards.
ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1: 2005 Edition 3.1 is identified as a consensus standard.
IEC 60601-1-2 Fourth Edition is identified as a consensus standard.
Electrical safety and EMC testing were performed by Nemko, registered as IECEE CBTL.
The section refers to Appendix F Safety Test Report and Appendix G EMC Test Report.

entities.name: Nemko
entities.evidence: Electrical safety and EMC testing have been performed by Nemko (which is registered as IECEE CBTL).

entities.evidence: Nemko (which is registered as IECEE CBTL).
